hooks.statusMessage: Running unit tests after src/ edit...
hooks.command: export PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH"; f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); case "$f" in */rifugio-website/src/*) cd /Users/alberto.marsanasco/claude_home/rifugio-website && out=$(npm run test:unit --silent 2>&1); rc=$?; if [ $rc -ne 0 ]; then echo "Unit tests FAILED after edit to $f:" >&2; echo "$out" >&2; exit 2; fi ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac

hooks.statusMessage: Watching CI run after git push...
hooks.command: export PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH"; cd /Users/alberto.marsanasco/claude_home/rifugio-website && sleep 8 && out=$(gh run watch --exit-status 2>&1); rc=$?; if [ $rc -ne 0 ]; then echo "CI run FAILED after git push:" >&2; echo "$out" >&2; exit 2; fi; echo "CI run passed."
